61// The kind of failure handling that GetWorldFromContextObject uses
62enum class EGetWorldErrorMode
63{
64 // Silently returns nullptr, the calling code is expected to handle this gracefully
65 ReturnNull,
66
67 // Raises a runtime error but still returns nullptr, the calling code is expected to handle this gracefully
68 LogAndReturnNull,
69
70 // Asserts, the calling code is not expecting to handle a failure gracefully
71 Assert
72};
73
77UENUM()
78enum EFullyLoadPackageType : int
79{
81 FULLYLOAD_Map,
83 FULLYLOAD_Game_PreLoadClass,
85 FULLYLOAD_Game_PostLoadClass,
87 FULLYLOAD_Always,
89 FULLYLOAD_Mutator,
90 FULLYLOAD_MAX,
91};
92
93
97UENUM()
98enum class ETransitionType : uint8
99{
100 None,
101 Paused,
102 Loading,
103 Saving,
104 Connecting,
105 Precaching,
106 WaitingToConnect,
107 MAX
108};
109
111enum class EDynamicResolutionStatus
112{
113 // Dynamic resolution is not supported by this platform.
114 Unsupported,
115
116 // Dynamic resolution is disabled by project setting cvar r.DynamicRes.OperationMode=0 or disabled by game user
117 // settings with r.DynamicRes.OperationMode=1.
118 Disabled,
119
120 // Dynamic resolution has been paused by game thread.
121 Paused,
122
123 // Dynamic resolution is currently enabled.
124 Enabled,
125
126 // Forced enabled at static resolution fraction for profiling purpose with r.DynamicRes.TestScreenPercentage.
127 DebugForceEnabled,
128};
129
131struct FDynamicResolutionStateInfos
132{
133 // Status of dynamic resolution.
134 EDynamicResolutionStatus Status;
135
136 // Approximation of the resolution fraction being applied. This is only an approximation because
137 // of non (and unecessary) thread safety of this value between game thread, and render thread.
138 DynamicRenderScaling::TMap<float> ResolutionFractionApproximations;
139
140 // Maximum resolution fraction set, always MaxResolutionFraction >= ResolutionFractionApproximation.
141 DynamicRenderScaling::TMap<float> ResolutionFractionUpperBounds;
142};
143

166
167
168 FFullyLoadedPackagesInfo()
169 : FullyLoadType(0)
170 {
171 }
172
173};

177USTRUCT()
178struct FLevelStreamingStatus
179{
180 GENERATED_USTRUCT_BODY()
181
182 UPROPERTY()
183 FName PackageName;
184
185 UPROPERTY()
186 uint32 bShouldBeLoaded:1;
187
188 UPROPERTY()
189 uint32 bShouldBeVisible:1;
190
191 UPROPERTY()
192 uint32 LODIndex;
193
194
196 FLevelStreamingStatus(FName InPackageName, bool bInShouldBeLoaded, bool bInShouldBeVisible, int32 InLODIndex)
197 : PackageName(InPackageName), bShouldBeLoaded(bInShouldBeLoaded), bShouldBeVisible(bInShouldBeVisible), LODIndex(InLODIndex)
198 {}
199 FLevelStreamingStatus()
200 {
201 FMemory::Memzero(this, sizeof(FLevelStreamingStatus));
202 LODIndex = INDEX_NONE;
203 }
204
205};

285struct FNamedNetDriver
286{

289
290 UPROPERTY(transient)

295
296 FNamedNetDriver() :
297 NetDriver(nullptr),
298 NetDriverDef(nullptr)
299 {}
300
301 FNamedNetDriver(class UNetDriver* InNetDriver, FNetDriverDefinition* InNetDriverDef) :
302 NetDriver(InNetDriver),
303 NetDriverDef(InNetDriverDef)
304 {}
305
306 ~FNamedNetDriver() {}
307};

332USTRUCT()
333struct FWorldContext
334{
335 GENERATED_USTRUCT_BODY()
336
337 /**************************************************************/
338
339 TEnumAsByte<EWorldType::Type> WorldType;
340
341 FSeamlessTravelHandler SeamlessTravelHandler;
342
343 FName ContextHandle;
344
346 FString TravelURL;
347
349 uint8 TravelType;
350
352 UPROPERTY()
353 struct FURL LastURL;
354
356 UPROPERTY()
357 struct FURL LastRemoteURL;
358
359 UPROPERTY()
360 TObjectPtr<UPendingNetGame> PendingNetGame;
361
363 UPROPERTY()
364 TArray<struct FFullyLoadedPackagesInfo> PackagesToFullyLoad;
365
370 TArray<FName> LevelsToLoadForPendingMapChange;
371
373 UPROPERTY()
374 TArray<TObjectPtr<class ULevel>> LoadedLevelsForPendingMapChange;
375
377 FString PendingMapChangeFailureDescription;
378
380 uint32 bShouldCommitPendingMapChange:1;
381
383 UPROPERTY()
384 TArray<TObjectPtr<class UObjectReferencer>> ObjectReferencers;
385
386 UPROPERTY()
387 TArray<struct FLevelStreamingStatus> PendingLevelStreamingStatusUpdates;
388
389 UPROPERTY()
390 TObjectPtr<class UGameViewportClient> GameViewport;
391
392 UPROPERTY()
393 TObjectPtr<class UGameInstance> OwningGameInstance;
394
396 UPROPERTY(transient)
397 TArray<FNamedNetDriver> ActiveNetDrivers;
398
400 int32 PIEInstance;
401
403 FString PIEPrefix;
404
406 ERHIFeatureLevel::Type PIEWorldFeatureLevel;
407
409 bool RunAsDedicated;
410
412 bool bWaitingOnOnlineSubsystem;
413
415 bool bIsPrimaryPIEInstance;
416
418 uint32 AudioDeviceID;
419
421 FString CustomDescription;
422
423 // If > 0, tick this world at a fixed rate in PIE
424 float PIEFixedTickSeconds = 0.f;
425 float PIEAccumulatedTickSeconds = 0.f;
426
428 TSet<FObjectKey> GarbageObjectsToVerify;
429
430 /**************************************************************/
431
433 TArray<TObjectPtr<UWorld>*> ExternalReferences;
434
436 void AddRef(UWorld*& WorldPtr)
437 {
438 AddRef(ObjectPtrWrap(WorldPtr));
439 }
440
441 void AddRef(TObjectPtr<UWorld>& WorldPtr)
442 {
443 WorldPtr = ThisCurrentWorld;
444 ExternalReferences.AddUnique(&WorldPtr);
445 }
446
448 void RemoveRef(UWorld*& WorldPtr)
449 {
450 ExternalReferences.Remove(&ObjectPtrWrap(WorldPtr));
451 WorldPtr = nullptr;
452 }
453
455 ENGINE_API void SetCurrentWorld(UWorld *World);
456
458 void AddReferencedObjects(FReferenceCollector& Collector, const UObject* ReferencingObject);
459
460 FORCEINLINE UWorld* World() const
461 {
462 return ThisCurrentWorld;
463 }
464
465 FWorldContext()
466 : WorldType(EWorldType::None)
467 , ContextHandle(NAME_None)
468 , TravelURL()
469 , TravelType(0)
470 , PendingNetGame(nullptr)
471 , bShouldCommitPendingMapChange(0)
472 , GameViewport(nullptr)
473 , OwningGameInstance(nullptr)
474 , PIEInstance(INDEX_NONE)
475 , PIEWorldFeatureLevel(ERHIFeatureLevel::Num)
476 , RunAsDedicated(false)
477 , bWaitingOnOnlineSubsystem(false)
478 , bIsPrimaryPIEInstance(false)
479 , AudioDeviceID(INDEX_NONE)
480 , ThisCurrentWorld(nullptr)
481 { }
482
483private:
484
485 TObjectPtr<UWorld> ThisCurrentWorld;
486};
487

707UCLASS(abstract, config=Engine, defaultconfig, transient, MinimalAPI)
708class UEngine
709 : public UObject
710 , public FExec
711{
712 GENERATED_UCLASS_BODY()
713
714private:

716 TObjectPtr<class UFont> TinyFont;
717

725 TObjectPtr<class UFont> SmallFont;
726

1512 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category=Settings)
1513 float NearClipPlane;
1514
1516 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category=Subtitles)
1517 uint32 bSubtitlesEnabled:1;
1518
1520 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category=Subtitles)
1521 uint32 bSubtitlesForcedOff:1;
1522
1524 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category=Blueprints)
1525 int32 MaximumLoopIterationCount;
1526
1527 // Controls whether Blueprint subclasses of actors or components can tick by default.
1528 //
1529 // Blueprints that derive from native C++ classes that have bCanEverTick=true will always be able to tick
1530 // Blueprints that derive from exactly AActor or UActorComponent will always be able to tick
1531 // Otherwise, they can tick as long as the parent doesn't have meta=(ChildCannotTick) and either bCanBlueprintsTickByDefault is true or the parent has meta=(ChildCanTick)
1532 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category=Blueprints)
1533 uint32 bCanBlueprintsTickByDefault:1;
1534
1536 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category="Anim Blueprints")
1537 uint32 bOptimizeAnimBlueprintMemberVariableAccess:1;
1538
1540 UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, config, Category="Anim Blueprints")
1541 uint32 bAllowMultiThreadedAnimationUpdate:1;
1542
1544 UPROPERTY(config)
1545 uint32 bEnableEditorPSysRealtimeLOD:1;
1546
1548 uint32 bForceDisableFrameRateSmoothing : 1;
1549
1551 UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category=Framerate, meta=(EditCondition="!bUseFixedFrameRate"))
1552 uint32 bSmoothFrameRate:1;
1553
1555 UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category=Framerate)
1556 uint32 bUseFixedFrameRate : 1;
1557
1559 UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category=Framerate, meta=(EditCondition="bUseFixedFrameRate", ClampMin = "15.0"))
1560 float FixedFrameRate;
1561
1563 UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category=Framerate, meta=(UIMin=0, UIMax=200, EditCondition="!bUseFixedFrameRate"))
1564 FFloatRange SmoothedFrameRateRange;
1565

1840private:
1842 FPreRenderDelegate PreRenderDelegate;
1843 FPreRenderDelegateEx PreRenderDelegateEx;
1845 FPostRenderDelegate PostRenderDelegate;
1846 FPostRenderDelegateEx PostRenderDelegateEx;
1847
1848public:
1849 UE_DEPRECATED(5.0, "Please use GetPreRenderDelegateEx().")
1850 FPreRenderDelegate& GetPreRenderDelegate() { return PreRenderDelegate; }
1851 FPreRenderDelegateEx& GetPreRenderDelegateEx() { return PreRenderDelegateEx; }
1852 UE_DEPRECATED(5.0, "Please use GetPostRenderDelegateEx().")
1853 FPostRenderDelegate& GetPostRenderDelegate() { return PostRenderDelegate; }
1854 FPostRenderDelegateEx& GetPostRenderDelegateEx() { return PostRenderDelegateEx; }
1855
1862 DECLARE_EVENT_ThreeParams(UEngine, FOnTravelFailure, UWorld*, ETravelFailure::Type, const FString&);
1863 FOnTravelFailure TravelFailureEvent;
1864
1872 DECLARE_EVENT_FourParams(UEngine, FOnNetworkFailure, UWorld*, UNetDriver*, ENetworkFailure::Type, const FString&);
1873 FOnNetworkFailure NetworkFailureEvent;
1874
1878 DECLARE_EVENT_ThreeParams(UEngine, FOnNetworkLagStateChanged, UWorld*, UNetDriver*, ENetworkLagState::Type);
1879 FOnNetworkLagStateChanged NetworkLagStateChangedEvent;
1880
1886 DECLARE_EVENT_ThreeParams(UEngine, FOnNetworkDDoSEscalation, UWorld*, UNetDriver*, FString /*SeverityCategory*/);
1887 FOnNetworkDDoSEscalation NetworkDDoSEscalationEvent;
1888
1889 // for IsInitialized()
1890 bool bIsInitialized;
1891
1892private:
1893
1895 uint64 LastGCFrame;
1896
1898 float TimeSinceLastPendingKillPurge;
1899
1901 bool bFullPurgeTriggered;
1902
1904 bool bGCPerformingFullPurge = false;
1905
1907 bool bShouldDelayGarbageCollect;
1908
1909public:
1910
1914 const FLinearColor& GetSelectedMaterialColor() const { return bIsOverridingSelectedColor ? SelectedMaterialColorOverride : SelectedMaterialColor; }
1915
1916 const FLinearColor& GetSelectionOutlineColor() const { return SelectionOutlineColor; }
1917
1918 const FLinearColor& GetSubduedSelectionOutlineColor() const { return SubduedSelectionOutlineColor; }
1919
1920 const FLinearColor& GetHoveredMaterialColor() const { return GetSelectedMaterialColor(); }
1921
1929 void SetSelectedMaterialColor( const FLinearColor& InSelectedMaterialColor ) { SelectedMaterialColor = InSelectedMaterialColor; }
1930
1931 void SetSelectionOutlineColor( const FLinearColor& InSelectionOutlineColor ) { SelectionOutlineColor = InSelectionOutlineColor; }
1932
1933 void SetSubduedSelectionOutlineColor( const FLinearColor& InSubduedSelectionOutlineColor ) { SubduedSelectionOutlineColor = InSubduedSelectionOutlineColor; }
1939 ENGINE_API void OverrideSelectedMaterialColor( const FLinearColor& OverrideColor );
1940
1944 ENGINE_API void RestoreSelectedMaterialColor();
1945
1947 ENGINE_API void GetDynamicResolutionCurrentStateInfos(FDynamicResolutionStateInfos& OutInfos) const;
1948
1950 ENGINE_API void PauseDynamicResolution();
1951
1953 FORCEINLINE void ResumeDynamicResolution()
1954 {
1955 #if WITH_DYNAMIC_RESOLUTION
1956 bIsDynamicResolutionPaused = false;
1957 UpdateDynamicResolutionStatus();
1958 #endif // !UE_SERVER
1959 }
1960
1962 ENGINE_API void EmitDynamicResolutionEvent(EDynamicResolutionStateEvent Event);
1963
1965 FORCEINLINE class IDynamicResolutionState* GetDynamicResolutionState()
1966 {
1967 #if !WITH_DYNAMIC_RESOLUTION
1968 return nullptr;
1969 #else
1970 // Returns next's frame dynamic resolution state to keep game thread consistency after a ChangeDynamicResolutionStateAtNextFrame().
1971 check(NextDynamicResolutionState.IsValid() || IsRunningCommandlet() || IsRunningDedicatedServer());
1972 return NextDynamicResolutionState.Get();
1973 #endif
1974 }
1975
1979 ENGINE_API void ChangeDynamicResolutionStateAtNextFrame(TSharedPtr< class IDynamicResolutionState > NewState);
1980
1982 FORCEINLINE bool GetDynamicResolutionUserSetting() const
1983 {
1984 #if !WITH_DYNAMIC_RESOLUTION
1985 return false;
1986 #else
1987 return bDynamicResolutionEnableUserSetting;
1988 #endif
1989 }
1990
1992 FORCEINLINE void SetDynamicResolutionUserSetting(bool Enable)
1993 {
1994 #if WITH_DYNAMIC_RESOLUTION
1995 bDynamicResolutionEnableUserSetting = Enable;
1996 UpdateDynamicResolutionStatus();
1997 #endif
1998 }
1999
2003 ENGINE_API void LoadDefaultBloomTexture();
2004
2008 ENGINE_API void LoadBlueNoiseTexture(bool LoadVector2BlueNoiseTexture);
2009
2011 ENGINE_API void LoadDefaultFilmGrainTexture();
2012
2014 ENGINE_API void ConditionallyLoadPreIntegratedSkinBRDFTexture();
2015
2017 ENGINE_API void LoadLTCTextures();
2018
2020 ENGINE_API void LoadEnergyTextures();
2021
2025 ENGINE_API void LoadGlintTextures();
2026
2027
2031 ENGINE_API void LoadSimpleVolumeTextures();
2032
2033private:
2034 #if WITH_DYNAMIC_RESOLUTION
2036 EDynamicResolutionStateEvent LastDynamicResolutionEvent;
2037
2039 TSharedPtr< class IDynamicResolutionState > DynamicResolutionState;
2040
2042 TSharedPtr< class IDynamicResolutionState > NextDynamicResolutionState;
2043
2045 bool bIsDynamicResolutionPaused;
2046
2048 bool bDynamicResolutionEnableUserSetting;
2049
2051 ENGINE_API bool ShouldEnableDynamicResolutionState() const;
2052
2054 ENGINE_API void UpdateDynamicResolutionStatus();
2055 #endif
2056
2057protected:
2058
2060 FAudioDeviceManager* AudioDeviceManager = nullptr;
2061
2063 FAudioDeviceHandle MainAudioDeviceHandle;

2260 FOnTravelFailure& OnTravelFailure() { return TravelFailureEvent; }
2262 void BroadcastTravelFailure(UWorld* InWorld, ETravelFailure::Type FailureType, const FString& ErrorString = TEXT(""))
2263 {
2264 UE_LOGSTATUS(Warning, TEXT("Travel failed, type: %s, reason: \"%s\""), *UEnum::GetValueAsString(FailureType), *ErrorString);
2265 TravelFailureEvent.Broadcast(InWorld, FailureType, ErrorString);
2266 }
2267
2269 FOnNetworkFailure& OnNetworkFailure() { return NetworkFailureEvent; }
2271 ENGINE_API void BroadcastNetworkFailure(UWorld * World, UNetDriver *NetDriver, ENetworkFailure::Type FailureType, const FString& ErrorString = TEXT(""));
2272
2274 FOnNetworkLagStateChanged& OnNetworkLagStateChanged() { return NetworkLagStateChangedEvent; }
2276 void BroadcastNetworkLagStateChanged(UWorld * World, UNetDriver *NetDriver, ENetworkLagState::Type LagType)
2277 {
2278 NetworkLagStateChangedEvent.Broadcast(World, NetDriver, LagType);
2279 }
2280
2282 FOnNetworkDDoSEscalation& OnNetworkDDoSEscalation() { return NetworkDDoSEscalationEvent; }
2284 void BroadcastNetworkDDosSEscalation(UWorld* World, UNetDriver* NetDriver, FString SeverityCategory)
2285 {
2286 NetworkDDoSEscalationEvent.Broadcast(World, NetDriver, SeverityCategory);
2287 }

3023 struct FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams
3024 {
3025 UE_DEPRECATED(5.1, "Aggressive Default Subobject Replacement is no longer being done. An ensure has been left in place to catch any cases that was making use of this feature.")
3026 bool bAggressiveDefaultSubobjectReplacement;
3027 bool bDoDelta;
3028 bool bReplaceObjectClassReferences;
3029 bool bCopyDeprecatedProperties;
3030 bool bPreserveRootComponent;
3031 bool bPerformDuplication;
3032 bool bOnlyHandleDirectSubObjects;
3033
3035 bool bSkipCompilerGeneratedDefaults;
3036 bool bNotifyObjectReplacement;
3037 bool bClearReferences;
3038 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "This isn't used anymore by the code.")
3039 bool bDontClearReferenceIfNewerClassExists;
3040 bool bReplaceInternalReferenceUponRead; // While reading back object ptr, immediately replace them if they are in the replacement map.
3041
3042 // In cases where the SourceObject will no longer be able to look up its correct Archetype, it can be supplied
3043 UObject* SourceObjectArchetype;
3044 TMap<UObject*, UObject*>* OptionalReplacementMappings;
3045 const TMap<UClass*, UClass*>* OptionalOldToNewClassMappings; // Will be used along with the bReplaceInternalReferenceUponRead;
3046
3047 ENGINE_API FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams();
3048 ENGINE_API FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams(const FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams&);
3049 };
3050 static ENGINE_API void CopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjects(UObject* OldObject, UObject* NewObject, FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams Params = FCopyPropertiesForUnrelatedObjectsParams());
3051 virtual void NotifyToolsOfObjectReplacement(const TMap<UObject*, UObject*>& OldToNewInstanceMap) { }

3595
3596 // Async map change/ persistent level transition code.
3597
3605 ENGINE_API bool CommitMapChange( FWorldContext &Context);
3606
3612 ENGINE_API bool IsReadyForMapChange(FWorldContext &Context);
3613
3619 ENGINE_API bool IsPreparingMapChange(FWorldContext &Context);
3620
3631 ENGINE_API bool PrepareMapChange(FWorldContext &WorldContext, const TArray<FName>& LevelNames);
3632
3638 ENGINE_API FString GetMapChangeFailureDescription(FWorldContext &Context);
3639
3641 ENGINE_API void ConditionalCommitMapChange(FWorldContext &WorldContext);
3642
3644 ENGINE_API void CancelPendingMapChange(FWorldContext &Context);
3645
3646public:
3647
3648 //~ Begin Public Interface for async map change functions
3649
3650 bool CommitMapChange(UWorld* InWorld) { return CommitMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3651 bool IsReadyForMapChange(UWorld* InWorld) { return IsReadyForMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3652 bool IsPreparingMapChange(UWorld* InWorld) { return IsPreparingMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3653 bool PrepareMapChange(UWorld* InWorld, const TArray<FName>& LevelNames) { return PrepareMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld), LevelNames); }
3654 void ConditionalCommitMapChange(UWorld* InWorld) { return ConditionalCommitMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3655
3656 FString GetMapChangeFailureDescription(UWorld *InWorld) { return GetMapChangeFailureDescription(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3657
3659 void CancelPendingMapChange(UWorld *InWorld) { return CancelPendingMapChange(GetWorldContextFromWorldChecked(InWorld)); }
3660

3686#if WITH_EDITOR
3687 //~ Begin Transaction Interfaces.
3688 virtual int32 BeginTransaction(const TCHAR* TransactionContext, const FText& Description, UObject* PrimaryObject) { return INDEX_NONE; }
3689 virtual int32 EndTransaction() { return INDEX_NONE; }
3690 virtual bool CanTransact() { return false; }
3691 virtual void CancelTransaction(int32 Index) { }
3692#endif
3693
3694public:
3698 UEngineSubsystem* GetEngineSubsystemBase(TSubclassOf<UEngineSubsystem> SubsystemClass) const
3699 {
3700 PRAGMA_DISABLE_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS
3701 checkSlow(IsThisNotNull(this, "UEngine::GetEditorSubsystemBase"));
3702 PRAGMA_ENABLE_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS
3703 return EngineSubsystemCollection.GetSubsystem<UEngineSubsystem>(SubsystemClass);
3704 }
3705
3709 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
3710 TSubsystemClass* GetEngineSubsystem() const
3711 {
3712 PRAGMA_DISABLE_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS
3713 checkSlow(IsThisNotNull(this, "UEngine::GetEditorSubsystem"));
3714 PRAGMA_ENABLE_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS
3715 return EngineSubsystemCollection.GetSubsystem<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
3716 }
3717
3721 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
3722 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "This function is unsafe for re-entrancy and has been deprecated. Use ForEachEngineSubsystem or GetEngineSubsystemArrayCopy instead")
3723 const TArray<TSubsystemClass*>& GetEngineSubsystemArray() const
3724 {
3725 return EngineSubsystemCollection.GetSubsystemArray<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
3726 }
3727
3733 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
3734 TArray<TSubsystemClass*> GetEngineSubsystemArrayCopy() const
3735 {
3736 return EngineSubsystemCollection.GetSubsystemArrayCopy<TSubsystemClass>(TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
3737 }
3738
3742 template <typename TSubsystemClass>
3743 void ForEachEngineSubsystem(TFunctionRef<void(TSubsystemClass*)> Operation) const
3744 {
3745 static_assert(TIsDerivedFrom<TSubsystemClass, UEngineSubsystem>::IsDerived, "TSubsystemClass must be derived from UEngineSubsystem");
3746 return EngineSubsystemCollection.ForEachSubsystem([Operation=MoveTemp(Operation)](UEngineSubsystem* Subsystem){
3747 Operation(CastChecked<TSubsystemClass>(Subsystem));
3748 }, TSubsystemClass::StaticClass());
3749 }
3750
3751protected:
3752 FObjectSubsystemCollection<UEngineSubsystem> EngineSubsystemCollection;
3753
3754public:

3825 ENGINE_API int32 RenderNamedEventsEnabled(FCanvas* Canvas, int32 X, int32 Y);

3834 //typedef bool (UEngine::* EngineStatToggle)(UWorld* World, FCommonViewportClient* ViewportClient, const TCHAR* Stream);
3835 DECLARE_DELEGATE_RetVal_ThreeParams(bool, FEngineStatToggle, UWorld* /*World*/, FCommonViewportClient* /*ViewportClient*/, const TCHAR* /*Stream*/)
3836
3837
3848 //typedef int32(UEngine::* EngineStatRender)(UWorld* World, FViewport* Viewport, FCanvas* Canvas, int32 X, int32 Y, const FVector* ViewLocation, const FRotator* ViewRotation);
3849 DECLARE_DELEGATE_RetVal_SevenParams(int32, FEngineStatRender, UWorld* /*World*/, FViewport* /*Viewport*/, FCanvas* /*Canvas*/, int32 /*X*/, int32 /*Y*/, const FVector* /*ViewLocation*/, const FRotator* /*ViewRotation*/)
3850
3853 ENGINE_API void AddEngineStat(const FName& InCommandName, const FName& InCategoryName, const FText& InDescriptionString, FEngineStatRender InRenderFunc = nullptr, FEngineStatToggle InToggleFunc = nullptr, const bool bInIsRHS = false);
3854
3855 ENGINE_API void RemoveEngineStat(const FName& InCommandName);
3856private:
3857
3859 struct FEngineStatFuncs
3860 {
3862 FName CommandName;
3863
3865 FString CommandNameString;
3866
3868 FName CategoryName;
3869
3871 FText DescriptionString;
3872
3875 FEngineStatRender RenderFunc;
3876
3879 FEngineStatToggle ToggleFunc;
3880
3882 bool bIsRHS;
3883
3885 FEngineStatFuncs(const FName& InCommandName, const FName& InCategoryName, const FText& InDescriptionString, FEngineStatRender InRenderFunc, FEngineStatToggle InToggleFunc, const bool bInIsRHS = false)
3886 : CommandName(InCommandName)
3887 , CommandNameString(InCommandName.ToString())
3888 , CategoryName(InCategoryName)
3889 , DescriptionString(InDescriptionString)
3890 , RenderFunc(InRenderFunc)
3891 , ToggleFunc(InToggleFunc)
3892 , bIsRHS(bInIsRHS)
3893 {
3894 CommandNameString.RemoveFromStart(TEXT("STAT_"));
3895 }
3896 };
3897
3899 TArray<FEngineStatFuncs> EngineStats;
3900
3901 // Helper struct that registers itself with the output redirector and copies off warnings
3902 // and errors that we'll overlay on the client viewport
3903 struct FErrorsAndWarningsCollector;
3904 TPimplPtr<FErrorsAndWarningsCollector> ErrorsAndWarningsCollector;
3905
3906private:
3907
